questions.question: Does build_parser() include --download-model as action='store_true' with default=False?
questions.actionable_check: python3 -c "from textbrush.cli import build_parser; p = build_parser(); a = p.parse_args([]); print(a.download_model)"

questions.question: Is --prompt now required=False in build_parser() (parser accepts args with neither --prompt nor --download-model)?
questions.actionable_check: python3 -c "from textbrush.cli import build_parser; p = build_parser(); a = p.parse_args([]); print(a.prompt)"
questions.pass_criteria: parser.parse_args([]).prompt is None without raising SystemExit

questions.question: Does main([]) exit with code 2 and stderr contain 'one of --prompt or --download-model'?
Does main(['--download-model', '--prompt', 'test']) exit with code 2 and stderr contain conflict message?
Does main(['--download-model', '--headless']) exit with code 2 and stderr contain conflict message?
Does --download-model dispatch print license URL and 'Downloading FLUX.1 schnell model (~23 GB)...' to stderr?
Does success path print 'Model downloaded successfully to: <path>' to stderr and exit 0?
Does TokenRequiredError produce multi-line instructions with HF_TOKEN and token URL, exiting 1?
Does generic Exception produce 'Download failed: <msg>' on stderr and exit 1?

mandatory_questions.question: Does ruff report zero linting issues for textbrush/cli.py and tests/test_cli.py?
mandatory_questions.actionable_check: python3 -m ruff check textbrush/cli.py tests/test_cli.py tests/e2e/test_full_workflow.py

mandatory_questions.question: Do all 132 tests pass with zero failures?
mandatory_questions.pass_criteria: 132/132 tests pass in test_cli.py, test_weights.py, test_config.py

mandatory_questions.question: Do all e2e_smoke tests pass including the new --download-model conflict tests?
evidence_required: 5/5 e2e_smoke tests pass (2 skipped require live model)
